source_pr.title: case: make TestSkipLargeTxnLock more stable
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

The lock_test.go will set lock-related global variables to small values
```
	// Speed up tests.
	defaultLockTTL = 3
	maxLockTTL = 120
	ttlFactor = 6
	oracleUpdateInterval = 2
``` 

For case `testSnapshotSuite.TestSkipLargeTxnLock`, the original logic will calculate lock ttl as `18`, 
which may cause the lock expire testing with tikv, integration tests may fail like
[link](https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/rest/organizations/jenkins/pipelines/tidb_ghpr_integration_common_test/runs/9616/nodes/119/steps/313/log/?start=0)
```
FAIL: snapshot_test.go:213: testSnapshotSuite.TestSkipLargeTxnLock^M
snapshot_test.go:237:^M
c.Assert(committer.commitKeys(bo, committer.keys), IsNil)^M
... value *errors.withStack = [kv:8022]Error: KV error safe to retry Txn(Mvcc(TxnLockNotFound { start_ts: TimeStamp(414697167142256691), commit_ts: TimeStamp(414697167142256692), key: [120, 95, 107, 101, 121, 95, 84, 101, 115, 116, 83, 107, 105, 112, 76, 97, 114, 103, 101, 84, 120, 110, 76, 111, 99, 107] })) []byte{0x78, 0x5f, 0x6b, 0x65, 0x79, 0x5f, 0x54, 0x65, 0x73, 0x74, 0x53, 0x6b, 0x69, 0x70, 0x4c, 0x61, 0x72, 0x67, 0x65, 0x54, 0x78, 0x6e, 0x4c, 0x6f, 0x63, 0x6b} [try again later] ("[kv:8022]Error: KV error safe to retry Txn(Mvcc(TxnLockNotFound { start_ts: TimeStamp(414697167142256691), commit_ts: TimeStamp(414697167142256692), key: [120, 95, 107, 101, 121, 95, 84, 101, 115, 116, 83, 107, 105, 112, 76, 97, 114, 103, 101, 84, 120, 110, 76, 111, 99, 107] })) []byte{0x78, 0x5f, 0x6b, 0x65, 0x79, 0x5f, 0x54, 0x65, 0x73, 0x74, 0x53, 0x6b, 0x69, 0x70, 0x4c, 0x61, 0x72, 0x67, 0x65, 0x54, 0x78, 0x6e, 0x4c, 0x6f, 0x63, 0x6b} [try again later]")^M
```

### What is changed and how it works?

Set lock ttl to original default value as constant

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test


Code changes



Side effects



Related changes



Release note

symptoms: PR body explains integration test failures when lock-related global variables are set small; lock ttl may expire in CI.
failure_signature: PR body explains integration test failures when lock-related global variables are set small; lock ttl may expire in CI.

evidence: evidence: PR body explains integration test failures when lock-related global variables are set small; lock ttl may expire in CI.
evidence: diff sets committer.lockTTL to a constant 3000 to avoid expiry (store/tikv/snapshot_test.go).
